title: Icarus treats all unqouted parameters containing 'e' as a float

features.name: parameterized module with integer default and display
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter declaration that has an integer default value, and a system task $display that prints the parameter value so that command-line overrides via -P can be observed at runtime

features.name: unquoted string parameter override containing exponent character
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module where the parameter is declared as an untyped default-integer parameter, and the design is instantiated or overridden with a command-line string value containing the letter 'e', triggering incorrect float parsing instead of string or integer interpretation
